description: Composition White polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, contrast spread collar with a half buttoned placket, branding embossed on the left chest, appliqué on the right sleeve, contrast panel starting from the sleeve to the hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash and dry inside out Machine wash cold in gentle cycle using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low and dry in shade Use mild iron Top notch style and comfort, this polo T-shirt from Reid & Taylor is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. The design and attention to detail will earn you fashion accolades, while the fabric keeps you fresh all day. Team this with slim jeans and casual shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
